The AFFIRMATIVE CLOSURE LEDGER shows:

However, the value_equality_status is "MISSING_REQUIRED_FIELD_VALUE" with all fields showing null values and "missing_required_field_value" failures.

Looking at the value_equality_failures - all 6 fields have failures

The blockers are specifically about "No exact field matches in sources" - which directly aligns with the fact that all required field values are null.

The AFFIRMATIVE CLOSURE LEDGER's claim that sources support closure is FALSE - the sources show NULL values for all required fields, not actual matches.

I must not silently drop these blockers. The value equality check shows all fields failed. The blockers are legitimately grounded in the source evidence showing NULL values.

Therefore, I must ESCALATE, not ALLOW. The blockers ART-001-BLK-9D709534 and ART-002-BLK-6722EBEE remain open.


I'll output the ESCALATE signal with full transparency about the unresolved blockers. The system requires explicit communication of the underlying issues preventing closure, highlighting the critical NULL value problem across all required fields.
</think>
